disclaimer: ⚠️ Warning: This tool is a calculation aid only and does not replace professional medical guidance. The use of anabolic steroids without medical supervision can cause serious harm to your health.

sideEffects.testE: 🩺 Common side effects: gynecomastia (treat with Nolvadex or Anastrozole), acne (strict skin hygiene), water retention (reduce sodium). Monitor blood pressure. For other symptoms, consult a doctor.
sideEffects.testC: 🩺 Common side effects: gynecomastia (treat with Nolvadex or Anastrozole), acne (strict skin hygiene), water retention (reduce sodium). Monitor blood pressure. For other symptoms, consult a doctor.
sideEffects.testP: 🩺 Common side effects: gynecomastia (treat with Nolvadex or Anastrozole), acne — can appear quickly due to short half-life. Less water retention than long esters. For other symptoms, consult a doctor.
sideEffects.testSusp: 🩺 Common side effects: gynecomastia (treat with Nolvadex or Anastrozole), intense acne — immediate action with no ester. Water retention possible. For other symptoms, consult a doctor.
sideEffects.sust: 🩺 Common side effects: gynecomastia (treat with Nolvadex or Anastrozole), acne, water retention — ester blend can make estrogen control tricky. For other symptoms, consult a doctor.
sideEffects.deca: 🩺 Common side effects: water retention, libido decrease and erectile dysfunction from elevated prolactin (treat with Cabergoline). Low aromatization; mild AI use may help with retention. For other symptoms, consult a doctor.
sideEffects.npp: 🩺 Common side effects: libido decrease and breast sensitivity from elevated prolactin (treat with Cabergoline), water retention — effects appear faster than Deca. For other symptoms, consult a doctor.
sideEffects.eq: 🩺 Common side effects: acne, significantly increased appetite, elevated hematocrit (blood thickening — monitor CBC regularly). Low aromatization; gynecomastia is rare. For other symptoms, consult a doctor.
sideEffects.trenA: 🩺 Common side effects: intense night sweats, acne, insomnia, gynecomastia from prolactin/progestin (treat with Cabergoline — AI doesn't help as it doesn't aromatize). Effects appear and resolve quickly due to short half-life. For other symptoms, consult a doctor.
sideEffects.trenE: 🩺 Common side effects: intense night sweats, acne, insomnia, gynecomastia from prolactin/progestin (treat with Cabergoline — AI doesn't help as it doesn't aromatize). Effects last longer due to long half-life. For other symptoms, consult a doctor.
sideEffects.mastP: 🩺 Side effects: generally mild; androgenic acne possible; hair loss in predisposed individuals (DHT genetics). Natural anti-estrogenic action may reduce water retention. For other symptoms, consult a doctor.
sideEffects.mastE: 🩺 Side effects: generally mild; androgenic acne possible; hair loss in predisposed individuals (DHT genetics). Natural anti-estrogenic action may reduce water retention. For other symptoms, consult a doctor.
sideEffects.winnyInj: 🩺 Common side effects: joint pain/dryness (use glucosamine + chondroitin), acne, severe cholesterol impact (HDL↓ LDL↑ — use omega-3 and monitor lipids). For other symptoms, consult a doctor.
sideEffects.primoInj: 🩺 Side effects: generally well tolerated; mild acne possible; hair loss in predisposed individuals. Very low hepatic and estrogenic impact. For other symptoms, consult a doctor.
sideEffects.gh: 🩺 Common side effects: water retention (mainly hands), carpal tunnel syndrome, possible insulin resistance at high doses. Management: dose adjustment and blood glucose monitoring. For other symptoms, consult a doctor.
sideEffects.anavar: 🩺 Common side effects: moderate liver stress (use TUDCA throughout the cycle), lipid changes (HDL↓ LDL↑ — use omega-3). Milder than most orals. For other symptoms, consult a doctor.
sideEffects.winnyOral: 🩺 Common side effects: significant liver stress (use TUDCA), joint pain (glucosamine + chondroitin), acne, severe cholesterol impact (HDL↓ LDL↑ — omega-3). For other symptoms, consult a doctor.
sideEffects.dbol: 🩺 Common side effects: intense gynecomastia (heavy aromatizer — treat with Nolvadex or Anastrozole), significant water retention, liver stress (use TUDCA). For other symptoms, consult a doctor.
sideEffects.adrol: 🩺 Common side effects: severe liver stress (use TUDCA — monitor liver enzymes), intense water retention. Gynecomastia possible via non-estrogenic mechanism (AI may not resolve it). For other symptoms, consult a doctor.
sideEffects.tbol: 🩺 Common side effects: moderate liver stress (use TUDCA), lipid changes (HDL↓ LDL↑ — use omega-3). Does not aromatize; gynecomastia is rare. For other symptoms, consult a doctor.
sideEffects.primoOral: 🩺 Side effects: generally well tolerated among orals; mild liver stress; hair loss in predisposed individuals. Monitor lipids. For other symptoms, consult a doctor.
sideEffects.proviron: 🩺 Side effects: generally well tolerated; androgenic acne possible; moderate lipid impact (monitor cholesterol). Mild anti-estrogenic action. For other symptoms, consult a doctor.

frequencyNotes.testE: 💉 Half-life ~4.5 days. For more stable levels, split into 2 weekly injections (e.g. Monday & Thursday).
frequencyNotes.testC: 💉 Half-life ~8 days. Can be injected once a week, but splitting into 2 injections (e.g. Monday & Thursday) improves level stability.
frequencyNotes.testP: 💉 Half-life ~1-2 days. Requires daily or every-other-day (EOD) injections to maintain stable levels.
frequencyNotes.testSusp: 💉 No ester — very short half-life. Requires daily or multiple daily injections to maintain stable levels.
frequencyNotes.sust: 💉 Ester blend with effective half-life ~7-10 days. For more stable levels, split into 2 weekly injections (e.g. Monday & Thursday).
frequencyNotes.deca: 💉 Half-life ~15 days. Typically injected once a week; some prefer splitting into 2 injections for greater stability.
frequencyNotes.npp: 💉 Half-life ~2-3 days. Requires every-other-day (EOD) or 3x/week (Mon/Wed/Fri) injections for stable levels.
frequencyNotes.eq: 💉 Half-life ~14 days. Typically injected once a week; cycles usually last 12-16 weeks for full results.
frequencyNotes.trenA: 💉 Half-life ~2-3 days. Requires every-other-day (EOD) or daily injections to maintain stable levels.
frequencyNotes.trenE: 💉 Half-life ~7-10 days. Split into 2 weekly injections (e.g. Monday & Thursday) to maintain stable levels.
frequencyNotes.mastP: 💉 Half-life ~2.5 days. Requires every-other-day (EOD) injections to maintain stable levels.
frequencyNotes.mastE: 💉 Half-life ~7-10 days. Split into 1-2 weekly injections to maintain stable levels.
frequencyNotes.winnyInj: 💉 Half-life ~24 hours. Requires daily or every-other-day (EOD) injections to maintain stable levels.
frequencyNotes.primoInj: 💉 Half-life ~7-10 days (enanthate ester). Split into 2 weekly injections (e.g. Monday & Thursday) to maintain stable levels.
frequencyNotes.gh: 💉 Half-life ~3.4 hours (subcutaneous). Daily subcutaneous injection is the most common protocol; some split into 2 daily injections to optimize GH peaks.
